name: Barbarian Rage Ends: Rage expires after a full round without attacking or taking damage
description: A Barbarian enters Rage and attacks on turn 1 (maintaining rage). On turn 2, the barbarian does NOT attack and the monster does NOT attack (AI: endTurn), so neither condition is met. When the barbarian's turn 2 ends, rage expires. On turn 3, the barbarian attacks WITHOUT the +2 rage damage bonus, proving rage ended.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action

features.name: Rage
features.description: Enter a Rage as a bonus action. Gain resistance to B/P/S damage and +2 melee damage.

actions.comment: Turn 1: Enter Rage — bonus action. Activates +2 melee damage and B/P/S resistance.
Turn 1: Attack with rage bonus active
Damage roll: 8 (die) + 4 (STR) + 2 (rage bonus) = 14 total slashing damage. Golem: 200 → 186
Turn 1 attack WITH rage bonus: 8 + 4 (STR) + 2 (rage) = 14 damage. Golem: 200 - 14 = 186
End turn 1. Barbarian attacked this turn → rage maintained.
Monster's turn (AI: endTurn). Monster does nothing — barbarian takes no damage.
Turn 2: Barbarian ends turn WITHOUT attacking. rageAttackedThisTurn=false, rageDamageTakenThisTurn=false. Rage should end when this turn ends.
Monster's turn (AI: endTurn). Between barbarian ending turn 2 and now, rage-end check fires: no attack + no damage taken → rage expires.
Turn 3: Attack WITHOUT rage bonus (rage has ended)
Damage roll: 8 (die) + 4 (STR) + 0 (NO rage bonus!) = 12 total slashing damage. Golem: 186 → 174
Turn 3 attack WITHOUT rage bonus: 8 + 4 (STR) = 12 damage. Golem: 186 - 12 = 174. The 2-damage difference (14 vs 12) proves rage ended.
